title: Fachübersetzen II (DE>EN) Gruppe 1
organisation: The Institute for Translation and Interpreting
further_info: Recommended Reading • Ching, F. (2012): A Visual Dictionary of Architecture, Hoboken: Wiley. • Ching, F. (2013): Introduction to Architecture, Hoboken: Wiley. • Olohan, M. (2016): Scientific and Technical Translation, Abington and New York: Routledge. • Stolze, R. (2013): Fachübersetzen - Ein Lehrbuch für Theorie und Praxis (Forum für Fachsprachen-Forschung), Berlin: Frank & Timme. A selected bibliography with additional literature will be provided at the beginning of class. online information e-learning course
